departures.extracted_value: Liquidated damages HK$25,000/day, uncapped (no aggregate cap)
departures.cited_text: no cap on the aggregate amount
departures.amendment_proposal: Cap aggregate liquidated damages at 10% of the Subcontract value.
departures.rationale: Uncapped LDs expose the Subcontractor to unlimited delay damages disproportionate to the package.
departures.proposed_position: Liquidated damages capped at 10% of the Subcontract value.

departures.extracted_value: Retention 10%, released only at Final Certificate
departures.amendment_proposal: Reduce retention to 5% with half released at Practical Completion.
departures.rationale: 10% retention held to Final Certificate ties up working capital for the full defects period.

departures.amendment_proposal: Reduce the Defects Liability Period to 12 months.
departures.rationale: A 24-month DLP is effectively an unpriced maintenance period.

departures.cited_text: not remedied within 5 days of written notice
departures.amendment_proposal: Extend the cure period to 14 days.
departures.rationale: A 5-day cure period is too short to remedy a genuine default before termination.
departures.proposed_position: 14-day cure period before termination for default.

departures.cited_text: assessed and certified within 30 business days
departures.amendment_proposal: Reduce the assessment period to 14 business days.
departures.rationale: A 30-business-day assessment delays cash recovery well beyond SOPA norms.
departures.proposed_position: Payment claims assessed within 14 business days.

departures.extracted_value: Notice of delay within 10 business days
departures.rationale: The notice period sits within the acceptable 5-10 business-day range.

departures.extracted_value: Total liability capped at the Subcontract value
departures.rationale: A liability cap is present at the Subcontract value; adequacy is a commercial judgement.

departures.cited_text: fit for their intended purpose for the life of the building
departures.rationale: Fitness for purpose is typically excluded by professional-indemnity insurance and outlives the business.
departures.proposed_position: Warranties limited to pass-through manufacturer warranties.

departures.cited_text: conditional upon the Contractor first receiving payment
departures.rationale: Pay-when-paid is prohibited under SOPA and shifts the Employer's insolvency risk onto the Subcontractor.
departures.proposed_position: Payment unconditional per the agreed payment schedule.

departures.rationale: No acceptable-terms criterion covers site hoarding or signage; surfaced for a human to place.

departures.extracted_value: Security may be called without notice
departures.amendment_proposal: Require 5 business days' notice before any call on the security.
departures.rationale: Calling the bank guarantee without notice is an ambush on the Subcontractor's security.
departures.proposed_position: 5 business days' written notice before any recourse to security.
